summary: Frontend-only testing of Events Panel (memórias de eventos) feature. All 7 features tested and working correctly: 1-day event form shows 'Data' field, period event form shows 'Início' and 'Fim' fields, event listing shows correct duration for periods, single-day review modal shows simple 'FOTOS 0/2' grid, multi-day review modal shows date tabs with 2 photos per day, correct total photo calculation (days × 2), and mobile responsiveness working well on 390x844 viewport.

event_form_single_day.details: Form shows 'DATA' label with single date input when '1 dia' is selected

event_form_period.details: Form shows 'INÍCIO' and 'FIM' labels with 2 date inputs when 'Período' is selected

event_listing_duration.details: Travel to NYC shows '17 de abr. — 27 de abr. · 11d' (11 days), UFC White House shows '4 de jun.' (single day)

review_modal_single_day.details: Aniversário (15 de mar.) shows 'FOTOS 0/2' with simple photo grid, no date tabs

review_modal_multi_day.details: Test Multi-Day Event (10 de mar. — 13 de mar.) shows 'FOTOS POR DIA 0/8' with date tabs: '10 de mar.', '11 de mar.', '12 de mar.', '13 de mar.'

photo_calculation.details: 4-day event shows '4 dias · até 8 fotos nas memórias' in form, and '0/8' in review modal (4 days × 2 = 8 photos)

mobile_responsiveness.details: Events page, event form, and review modal all work correctly on 390x844 mobile viewport. Date tabs are scrollable horizontally.

features_tested.event_listing_duration: PASS - Shows correct duration for period events (e.g., '11d')
features_tested.review_modal_multi_day: PASS - Shows date tabs with 2 photos per day
features_tested.mobile_responsiveness: PASS - All features work on 390x844 viewport

critical_code_review_comments: EventsPanel.jsx is well-structured with clear separation of EventForm, EventReviewModal, and PastEventCard components
getDateRange() and getDaysBetween() utility functions correctly calculate date ranges
photosByDay state structure allows flexible photo storage per day
isMultiDay detection works correctly based on eventDays.length > 1
seed_data_creation: Created 'Test Multi-Day Event' (10-13 Mar 2026) for testing multi-day review modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Events feature fully implemented and working. EventsPanel.jsx handles both single-day and multi-day events with appropriate UI for each. Review modal shows date tabs for multi-day events and simple photo grid for single-day events. Mobile responsiveness is good. Existing events in database: Travel to NYC (period 11 days), UFC White House (single day), Aniversário (single day past), Carnaval (period past).
